title: myoporum bontioides
intro: Myoporum bontioides, also known as Boongaree or native fig, is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Myoporum bontioides include tea infusions, tinctures, and poultices, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
